headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 22, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox edged out the Detroit Tigers 8-6 in a thrilling matchup, with Riley Greene leading the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit performance. The Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians 9-2, led by Isaac Paredes' strong performance, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 2 runs. The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, led by Rhett Lowder's strong performance.

Several key players have been affected by injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The San Francisco Giants have placed catcher Daniel Susac on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026. The Houston Astros have placed left fielder Taylor Trammell on the 10-day injured list with a left groin strain. The Boston Red Sox have placed right-handed pitcher Sonny Gray on the 15-day injured list with a right hamstring strain.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place in the past few days. The Houston Astros acquired shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded right-handed pitcher Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott.

top_news.title: **Tigers Fall to Red Sox in Thrilling 8-6 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox edged out the Detroit Tigers 8-6, securing a crucial win in their matchup. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit performance, including a key double that scored two runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Guardians 9-2**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians in a decisive 9-2 victory. Isaac Paredes led the Astros' offense with a strong performance, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 2 runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Take Down Rays 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, led by a strong performance from Rhett Lowder. Sal Stewart led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 3-5 loss to the Miami Marlins, marking their defeat in the matchup. Agustín Ramírez led the Cardinals' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Giants Place Catcher on Injured List**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants have placed catcher Daniel Susac on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.
